description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem switched shunts. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = aswshreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem switched shunts to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or switched shunt quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service switched shunts at in-service buses (type code < 4).
for all switched shunts at in-service buses (type code < 4).
for only in-service switched shunts, including those at type 4 buses.

string.description: Bus base voltage in kV.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in pu.
Actual bus voltage magnitude, in kV (in pu if base voltage is 0.0).
Bus voltage phase angle, in radians.
Bus voltage phase angle, in degrees.
Controlled quantity upper limit.
Controlled quantity lower limit.
Percent of total Mvar to be contributed by this switched shunt.
